title: Paint It Black
description: A griefing mod with several different ways to ruin someone's day.
body:
A griefing mod with many ways to paint your friend's house... black.
INKED FOREST:
a dark forest with dark logs. barren, yet no mobs spawn.
DEBARKER:
Late-game axe, but when clicked on an Inked Log, will give Ink Blots.
INK BLOTS:
main ingredient of the mod. can be used to make...
INK BLOCKS:
dark blocks that slow you down and reduce your jump.
INKGOTS:
blast-smelted ink blocks. can be used to make...
INK MINES:
project a pillar of ink upwards. 20 blocks tall.
INK TNT:
splatters ink everywhere in a 5-block radius,
THE SPLATTERER:
splatters ink, similar to the Ink TNT but when you hit a mob with it.
INK BOMB:
throwable Ink TNT
INK SOUP:
really good food, made with 6 ink blots and a bowl. however, takes longer to eat. gives resistance 2 and absorption 2 for a short time. gives nausea for a short time.
INK-GLAZED COOKIE:
easy-to make food which you can eat in half the time. gives resistance and nausea for a short time. excellent for combat.
